How's it going everybody? In this video I wanted to talk to you about disapproved ads. If you've advertised on Facebook for any length of time you've probably had some disapproved ads and that's okay, it happens to everybody. This is actually from one of our accounts when we were testing out some creative. Now when you get these emails it's going to show you which ads were not approved. Go ahead and click on that learn more to open up into your ad account and see if it gives you a reason. Sometimes it may not, it'll just give you a generic it doesn't comply with our advertising policy like these. So clicking on that learn more doesn't really help me in the situation but it's something you should always do just to make sure. Now what I really recommend is whenever you get an ad and there's not a clear reason it was disapproved, you think it's really good, you want to go ahead and appeal that. So we're going to include a link below this video to this appeal a disapproved ad page. Now if you've had any ads that are recently disapproved it's normally going to show them here and if you see the ad that you want to go and appeal you choose I'm referring to this ad. Now if you don't see it here you can choose this I'm referring to another ad it's going to give you the ability to put the ad ID in. Once you get the ad ID in here you can hit that confirm and you put that check mark and then you can click send. That's going to go and slide that ad to be reviewed sometimes by a real person sometimes just through a more in depth automated system to see if the ad actually can run. If they approve your ad on that appeal it's going to automatically start again. Now if you aren't sure how to find your ad account or ad ID numbers they give you a link right there. You can click on that and follow through this guide and it's going to show you how to get that information. So that's the first thing you should need to do whenever you get an ad disapproved is click on learn more in the email if it gives you a reason. Otherwise go get to this appeal form I recommend bookmarking it so you can get to it quickly and then submitting an appeal so that way they can review your ad again and try to get re-approved. If that still isn't working we have some other suggestions in the next videos on how to get your ads re-approved. Hope you enjoyed this and hope you have a great rest of your day.
